```tsx
                </tr>
              ) : (
                paged.map((doc: DocumentItem, idx: number) => (
                  <motion.tr
                    key={doc.id}
                    initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 15 }}
                    animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
                    transition={{ duration: 0.3, delay: idx * 0.04 }}
                    className="border-b border-border/30 hover:bg-muted/20 cursor-pointer transition-colors"
                    onClick={() => setSelectedDoc(doc)}
                  >
                    <td className="p-3">
                      <span className="font-mono text-xs text-teal-400">{doc.documentId}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3">
                      <span className="text-sm font-medium line-clamp-1">{doc.titleAr || doc.title}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3">
                      <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs sm:text-[10px] ${docTypeColors[doc.documentType] || ""}`}>
                        {docTypeLabels[doc.documentType] || doc.documentType}
                      </Badge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3">
                      <span className="font-mono text-xs bg-muted/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">{doc.verificationCode}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3">
                      <button
                        onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setDrillLeakId(doc.leakId); }}
                        className="text-xs text-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-300 hover:underline font-mono"
                      >
                        {doc.leakId}
                      </button>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-teal-500/30 to-cyan-500/30 flex items-center justify-center text-xs sm:text-[10px] font-bold text-teal-300">
                          {(doc.generatedByName || "?")[0]}
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-xs">{doc.generatedByName || "غير معروف"}</span>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3">
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                        {new Date(doc.createdAt).toLocaleDateString("ar-SA", { year: "numeric", month: "short", day: "numeric" })}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3">
                      {doc.isVerified !== false ? (
                        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30">
                          <CheckCircle2 className="h-3 w-3 ml-1" />
                          موثق
                        </Badge>
                      ) : (
                        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] bg-red-500/15 text-red-400 border-red-500/30">
                          <XCircle className="h-3 w-3 ml-1" />
                          ملغي
                        </Badge>
                      )}
                    </td>
                    <td className="p-3 text-center">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 w-7 p-0 text-muted-foreground hover:text-teal-400"
                          onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setSelectedDoc(doc); }}
                        >
                          <Eye className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                        {doc.pdfUrl && (
                          <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="sm"
                            className="h-7 w-7 p-0 text-muted-foreground hover:text-cyan-400"
                            onClick={(e) => {
                              e.stopPropagation();
                              window.open(doc.pdfUrl!, "_blank");
                            }}
                          >
                            <Download className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                          </Button>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </motion.tr>
                ))
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        {/* Pagination */}
        {totalPages > 1 && (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap p-3 border-t border-border/50">
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              عرض {page * PAGE_SIZE + 1} - {Math.min((page + 1) * PAGE_SIZE, documents.length)} من {documents.length}
            </span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                disabled={page === 0}
                onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}
                className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
              >
                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />
              </Button>
              {Array.from({ length: Math.min(totalPages, 5) }).map((_, i) => {
                const pageNum = totalPages <= 5 ? i : Math.max(0, Math.min(page - 2, totalPages - 5)) + i;
                return (
                  <Button
                    key={pageNum}
                    variant={page === pageNum ? "default" : "ghost"}
                    size="sm"
                    className={`h-7 w-7 p-0 text-xs ${page === pageNum ? "bg-teal-600 text-white" : ""}`}
                    onClick={() => setPage(pageNum)}
                  >
                    {pageNum + 1}
                  </Button>
                );
              })}
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                disabled={page >= totalPages - 1}
                onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}
                className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
              >
                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </Card>

      {/* Document Detail Modal */}
      <Dialog open={!!selectedDoc} onOpenChange={(o) => !o && setSelectedDoc(null)}>
        <DialogContent className="max-w-2xl max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto" dir="rtl">
          {selectedDoc && (
            <>
              <DialogHeader>
                <DialogTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <FileCheck className="h-5 w-5 text-teal-400" />
                  تفاصيل الوثيقة
                </DialogTitle>
              </DialogHeader>

              <div className="space-y-4 mt-4">
                {/* Document Info */}
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                    <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">رقم الوثيقة</p>
                    <p className="font-mono text-sm text-teal-400">{selectedDoc.documentId}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                    <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">كود التحقق</p>
                    <p className="font-mono text-sm">{selectedDoc.verificationCode}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                    <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">نوع الوثيقة</p>
                    <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${docTypeColors[selectedDoc.documentType] || ""}`}>
                      {docTypeLabels[selectedDoc.documentType] || selectedDoc.documentType}
                    </Badge>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                    <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">الحالة</p>
                    {selectedDoc.isVerified !== false ? (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30">
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-3 w-3 ml-1" />
                        موثق ومعتمد
                      </Badge>
                    ) : (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-red-500/15 text-red-400 border-red-500/30">
                        <XCircle className="h-3 w-3 ml-1" />
                        ملغي
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Title */}
                <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                  <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">عنوان الوثيقة</p>
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium">{selectedDoc.titleAr || selectedDoc.title}</p>
                </div>

                {/* Details */}
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                    <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">المُصدر</p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-teal-500/30 to-cyan-500/30 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-teal-300">
                        {(selectedDoc.generatedByName || "?")[0]}
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-sm">{selectedDoc.generatedByName || "غير معروف"}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                    <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">تاريخ الإصدار</p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                      <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
                      <span className="text-sm">
                        {new Date(selectedDoc.createdAt).toLocaleString("ar-SA", {
                          year: "numeric", month: "long", day: "numeric",
                          hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit"
                        })}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Leak Reference */}
                <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                  <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">حالة الرصد المرتبطة</p>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => { setSelectedDoc(null); setDrillLeakId(selectedDoc.leakId); }}
                    className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-300 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <ExternalLink className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                    {selectedDoc.leakId} — عرض تفاصيل حالة الرصد
                  </button>
                </div>

                {/* Content Hash */}
                <div className="bg-muted/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-border/30">
                  <p className="text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mb-1">بصمة المحتوى (Hash)</p>
                  <p className="font-mono text-xs sm:text-[10px] text-muted-foreground break-all">{selectedDoc.contentHash}</p>
                </div>

                {/* Actions */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
                  {selectedDoc.pdfUrl && (
                    <Button
                      className="flex-1 bg-teal-600 hover:bg-teal-700 text-white"
                      onClick={() => window.open(selectedDoc.pdfUrl!, "_blank")}
                    >
                      <Download className="h-4 w-4 ml-2" />
                      تحميل الوثيقة
                    </Button>
                  )}
                  <Button
                    variant="outline"
                    className="flex-1"
                    onClick={() => { setSelectedDoc(null); setDrillLeakId(selectedDoc.leakId); }}
                  >
                    <Eye className="h-4 w-4 ml-2" />
                    عرض حالة الرصد
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>

      {/* Leak Detail Drilldown */}
      {drillLeakId && (
        <LeakDetailDrilldown
          leak={{ leakId: drillLeakId } as any}
          open={!!drillLeakId}
          onClose={() => setDrillLeakId(null)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

---

## `client/src/pages/DynamicDashboard.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * DynamicDashboard — Enhanced Custom Dashboard with 20+ Widget Types
 * All data is fetched from real database via customPages.widgetData API
 * Supports flexible data source switching per widget
 */
import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo } from "react";
import { useParams } from "wouter";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import { trpc } from "../lib/trpc";
import {
  Plus, X, GripVertical, Settings, Trash2, RefreshCw, Share2,
  BarChart3, PieChart, TrendingUp, Activity, Table2, Gauge,
  Target, Layers, ArrowUpDown, Clock, Zap, ListOrdered,
  AreaChart, Radio, Radar,
  ChevronDown, Database, Eye, EyeOff, Maximize2,
  Minimize2, Copy, Download, Filter, LayoutGrid, List,
  Shield, Globe, Users, FileCheck, AlertTriangle, Mail,
  Sparkles, Save, Check, Loader2, Hash,
} from "lucide-react";

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WIDGET TYPE CATALOG — 22 widget types
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const WIDGET_CATALOG = [
  { type: "stat-card", label: "كرت إحصائي", labelEn: "Stat Card", icon: Target, category: "stats", description: "عرض إحصائية واحدة مع تفاصيل" },
  { type: "multi-stat", label: "إحصائيات متعددة", labelEn: "Multi Stats", icon: Layers, category: "stats", description: "عرض عدة إحصائيات في كرت واحد" },
  { type: "kpi-card", label: "مؤشر أداء KPI", labelEn: "KPI Card", icon: Gauge, category: "stats", description: "مؤشر أداء مع مجموع ومتوسط" },
  { type: "comparison", label: "مقارنة زمنية", labelEn: "Comparison", icon: ArrowUpDown, category: "stats", description: "مقارنة الشهر الحالي بالسابق" },
  { type: "bar-chart", label: "رسم أعمدة", labelEn: "Bar Chart", icon: BarChart3, category: "charts", description: "رسم بياني بالأعمدة" },
  { type: "horizontal-bar", label: "أعمدة أفقية", labelEn: "Horizontal Bar", icon: BarChart3, category: "charts", description: "رسم أعمدة أفقي" },
  { type: "pie-chart", label: "رسم دائري", labelEn: "Pie Chart", icon: PieChart, category: "charts", description: "رسم بياني دائري" },
  { type: "donut-chart", label: "رسم حلقي", labelEn: "Donut Chart", icon: PieChart, category: "charts", description: "رسم دائري مفرغ" },
  { type: "line-chart", label: "رسم خطي", labelEn: "Line Chart", icon: TrendingUp, category: "charts", description: "رسم بياني خطي زمني" },
  { type: "area-chart", label: "رسم مساحي", labelEn: "Area Chart", icon: AreaChart, category: "charts", description: "رسم مساحي مع تعبئة" },
  { type: "radar-chart", label: "رسم رادار", labelEn: "Radar Chart", icon: Radar, category: "charts", description: "رسم بياني شبكي" },
  { type: "data-table", label: "جدول بيانات", labelEn: "Data Table", icon: Table2, category: "data", description: "جدول بيانات مصغر" },
  { type: "mini-table", label: "جدول مصغر", labelEn: "Mini Table", icon: Table2, category: "data", description: "جدول مختصر بأهم البيانات" },
  { type: "live-feed", label: "تغذية مباشرة", labelEn: "Live Feed", icon: Activity, category: "data", description: "آخر الأحداث والتحديثات" },
  { type: "timeline", label: "خط زمني", labelEn: "Timeline", icon: Clock, category: "data", description: "عرض الأحداث بتسلسل زمني" },
  { type: "progress-bars", label: "أشرطة تقدم", labelEn: "Progress Bars", icon: Zap, category: "visual", description: "أشرطة تقدم نسبية" },
  { type: "progress-ring", label: "حلقة تقدم", labelEn: "Progress Ring", icon: Gauge, category: "visual", description: "حلقة دائرية للنسبة" },
  { type: "source-breakdown", label: "تحليل المصادر", labelEn: "Source Breakdown", icon: PieChart, category: "visual", description: "تحليل توزيع المصادر" },
  { type: "status-grid", label: "شبكة الحالات", labelEn: "Status Grid", icon: LayoutGrid, category: "visual", description: "شبكة حالات ملونة" },
  { type: "heatmap", label: "خريطة حرارية", labelEn: "Heatmap", icon: Layers, category: "visual", description: "خريطة حرارية للقيم" },
  { type: "top-list", label: "قائمة الأعلى", labelEn: "Top List", icon: ListOrdered, category: "rankings", description: "ترتيب أعلى القيم" },
  { type: "leaderboard", label: "لوحة الصدارة", labelEn: "Leaderboard", icon: ListOrdered, category: "rankings", description: "ترتيب تنافسي" },
];

const WIDGET_CATEGORIES = [
  { id: "all", label: "الكل", icon: LayoutGrid },
  { id: "stats", label: "إحصائيات", icon: Target },
  { id: "charts", label: "رسوم بيانية", icon: BarChart3 },
  { id: "data", label: "بيانات", icon: Table2 },
  { id: "visual", label: "مرئيات", icon: Layers },
  { id: "rankings", label: "ترتيبات", icon: ListOrdered },
];

const DATA_SOURCE_ICONS: Record<string, any> = {
  leaks: Shield, sellers: Users, evidence: FileCheck,
  sites: Globe, channels: Radio, incidents: AlertTriangle, letters: Mail,
};

type WidgetSize = "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl";
const SIZE_CLASSES: Record<WidgetSize, string> = {
  sm: "col-span-1",
  md: "col-span-1 md:col-span-2",
  lg: "col-span-1 md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-3",
  xl: "col-span-1 md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-4",
};

interface WidgetConfig {
  id: string;
  type: string;
  dataSource: string;
  size: WidgetSize;
  config: Record<string, any>;
  visible: boolean;
}

const SEVERITY_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  critical: "bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border-red-500/30",
  high: "bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400 border-orange-500/30",
  medium: "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 border-amber-500/30",
  low: "bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30",
};

const CHART_COLORS = [
  "#06b6d4", "#8b5cf6", "#f59e0b", "#ef4444", "#10b981",
  "#3b82f6", "#ec4899", "#14b8a6", "#f97316", "#6366f1",
];

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MAIN COMPONENT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
export default function DynamicDashboard() {
  const params = useParams<{ id: string }>();
  const pageId = Number(params.id);

  const pageQuery = trpc.customPages.getById.useQuery({ id: pageId }, { enabled: !!pageId });
  const updateMutation = trpc.customPages.update.useMutation();
  const dataSourcesQuery = trpc.customPages.dataSources.useQuery();

  const [widgets, setWidgets] = useState<WidgetConfig[]>([]);
  const [showCatalog, setShowCatalog] = useState(false);
  const [catalogCategory, setCatalogCategory] = useState("all");
  const [editingWidget, setEditingWidget] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
  const [showShareModal, setShowShareModal] = useState(false);
  const [globalDataSource, setGlobalDataSource] = useState("leaks");
  const [showDataSourcePicker, setShowDataSourcePicker] = useState(false);

  const dataSources = dataSourcesQuery.data || [];

  useEffect(() => {
    if (pageQuery.data?.config) {
      const config = typeof pageQuery.data.config === "string"
        ? JSON.parse(pageQuery.data.config)
        : pageQuery.data.config;
      if (config.widgets && Array.isArray(config.widgets)) {
        setWidgets(config.widgets);
      }
      if (config.globalDataSource) {
        setGlobalDataSource(config.globalDataSource);
      }
    }
  }, [pageQuery.data]);

  const saveConfig = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!pageId) return;
    setIsSaving(true);
    try {
      await updateMutation.mutateAsync({ id: pageId, config: { widgets, globalDataSource } });
    } catch (e) { console.error("Failed to save:", e); }
    setIsSaving(false);
  }, [pageId, widgets, globalDataSource, updateMutation]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditing && widgets.length > 0) {
      const timer = setTimeout(() => saveConfig(), 500);
      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    }
  }, [isEditing]);

  const addWidget = useCallback((type: string) => {
    const newWidget: WidgetConfig = {
      id: `w_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`,
      type,
      dataSource: globalDataSource,
      size: type.includes("table") || type === "timeline" ? "lg" : type.includes("chart") || type === "area-chart" ? "md" : "sm",
      config: {},
      visible: true,
    };
    setWidgets(prev => [...prev, newWidget]);
    setShowCatalog(false);
  }, [globalDataSource]);

  const removeWidget = useCallback((id: string) => {
    setWidgets(prev => prev.filter(w => w.id !== id));
  }, []);

  const updateWidget = useCallback((id: string, updates: Partial<WidgetConfig>) => {
    setWidgets(prev => prev.map(w => w.id === id ? { ...w, ...updates } : w));
  }, []);

  const toggleWidgetVisibility = useCallback((id: string) => {
    setWidgets(prev => prev.map(w => w.id === id ? { ...w, visible: !w.visible } : w));
  }, []);

  const changeGlobalDataSource = useCallback((newSource: string) => {
    setGlobalDataSource(newSource);
    setWidgets(prev => prev.map(w => ({ ...w, dataSource: newSource })));
    setShowDataSourcePicker(false);
  }, []);

  const pageTitle = pageQuery.data?.title || "لوحة مؤشرات مخصصة";

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen p-4 md:p-6" dir="rtl">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6 flex-wrap gap-3">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">
            <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-cyan-400" />
            {pageTitle}
          </h1>
          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1">
            {widgets.filter(w => w.visible).length} عنصر نشط • مصدر البيانات: {dataSources.find((ds: any) => ds.id === globalDataSource)?.label || globalDataSource}
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
          {/* Data Source Picker */}
          <div className="relative">
            <button onClick={() => setShowDataSourcePicker(!showDataSourcePicker)}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-700/50 text-slate-300 text-sm hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-all">
              <Database className="w-4 h-4 text-cyan-400" />
              <span>{dataSources.find((ds: any) => ds.id === globalDataSource)?.label || "مصدر البيانات"}</span>
              <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" />
            </button>
            <AnimatePresence>
              {showDataSourcePicker && (
                <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -5 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -5 }}
                  className="absolute top-full mt-1 left-0 right-0 min-w-[200px] bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl shadow-xl z-50 overflow-hidden">
                  {dataSources.map((ds: any) => {
                    const Icon = DATA_SOURCE_ICONS[ds.id] || Database;
                    return (
                      <button key={ds.id} onClick={() => changeGlobalDataSource(ds.id)}
                        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-right hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-colors ${ds.id === globalDataSource ? "bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400" : "text-slate-300"}`}>
                        <Icon className="w-4 h-4" /><span>{ds.label}</span>
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 mr-auto">{ds.labelEn}</span>
                        {ds.id === globalDataSource && <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-cyan-400" />}
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </motion.div>
              )}
            </AnimatePresence>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => { setIsEditing(!isEditing); if (isEditing) saveConfig(); }}
            className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${isEditing ? "bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/30" : "bg-slate-800/80 text-slate-300 border border-slate-700/50 hover:border-cyan-500/50"}`}>
            {isEditing ? <Save className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />}
            {isEditing ? "حفظ" : "تعديل"}
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => setShowCatalog(true)}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 text-white text-sm font-medium hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-cyan-500/20 transition-all">
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> إضافة عنصر
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => setShowShareModal(true)}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 text-slate-300 border border-slate-700/50 text-sm hover:border-purple-500/50 transition-all">
            <Share2 className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          {isSaving && <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-cyan-400 text-xs"><Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" /><span>جاري الحفظ...</span></div>}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Widgets Grid */}
      {widgets.length === 0 ? (
        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20">
          <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-500/20 to-blue-600/20 border border-cyan-500/30 flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
            <LayoutGrid className="w-10 h-10 text-cyan-400" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-white text-lg font-bold mb-2">لوحة فارغة</h3>
          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm mb-6 text-center max-w-md">ابدأ بإضافة عناصر من الكتالوج — أكثر من 22 نوع عنصر مختلف مع ربط بمصادر بيانات متعددة</p>
          <button onClick={() => setShowCatalog(true)} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 text-white font-medium hover:shadow-lg transition-all">
            <Plus className="w-5 h-5" /> إضافة أول عنصر
          </button>
        </motion.div>
      ) : (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          {widgets.filter(w => w.visible || isEditing).map((widget) => (
            <div key={widget.id} className={SIZE_CLASSES[widget.size]}>
              <WidgetRenderer widget={widget} isEditing={isEditing} onRemove={() => removeWidget(widget.id)}
                onUpdate={(updates) => updateWidget(widget.id, updates)} onToggleVisibility={() => toggleWidgetVisibility(widget.id)}
                onEdit={() => setEditingWidget(widget.id)} dataSources={dataSources} />
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Catalog Modal */}
      <AnimatePresence>
        {showCatalog && <WidgetCatalogModal onClose={() => setShowCatalog(false)} onSelect={addWidget} category={catalogCategory} onCategoryChange={setCatalogCategory} />}
      </AnimatePresence>

      {/* Settings Modal */}
      <AnimatePresence>
        {editingWidget && widgets.find(w => w.id === editingWidget) && (
          <WidgetSettingsModal widget={widgets.find(w => w.id === editingWidget)!} dataSources={dataSources}
            onClose={() => setEditingWidget(null)} onUpdate={(updates) => { updateWidget(editingWidget, updates); setEditingWidget(null); }} />
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>

      {/* Share Modal */}
      <AnimatePresence>
        {showShareModal && <ShareModal pageId={pageId} onClose={() => setShowShareModal(false)} />}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WIDGET RENDERER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function WidgetRenderer({ widget, isEditing, onRemove, onUpdate, onToggleVisibility, onEdit, dataSources }: {
  widget: WidgetConfig; isEditing: boolean; onRemove: () => void; onUpdate: (u: Partial<WidgetConfig>) => void;
  onToggleVisibility: () => void; onEdit: () => void; dataSources: any[];
}) {
  const dataQuery = trpc.customPages.widgetData.useQuery(
    { widgetType: widget.type, dataSource: widget.dataSource, config: widget.config },
    { staleTime: 30000, refetchOnWindowFocus: false }
  );
  const data = dataQuery.data?.data;
  const isLoading = dataQuery.isLoading;
  const catalogItem = WIDGET_CATALOG.find(c => c.type === widget.type);
  const dsInfo = dataSources.find((ds: any) => ds.id === widget.dataSource);

  return (
    <motion.div layout initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }} animate={{ opacity: widget.visible ? 1 : 0.5, scale: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
      className={`relative rounded-2xl border overflow-hidden transition-all ${isEditing ? "border-cyan-500/30 ring-1 ring-cyan-500/10" : "border-slate-700/50"}`}
      style={{ background: "linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,0.95) 0%, rgba(30,41,59,0.95) 100%)" }}>
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-slate-700/30">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
          {isEditing && <GripVertical className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500 cursor-grab flex-shrink-0" />}
          {catalogItem && <catalogItem.icon className="w-4 h-4 text-cyan-400 flex-shrink-0" />}
          <span className="text-white text-sm font-medium truncate">{catalogItem?.label || widget.type}</span>
          {dsInfo && <span className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0">{dsInfo.label}</span>}
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
          {isLoading && <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 text-cyan-400 animate-spin" />}
          {isEditing && (
            <>
              <button onClick={onEdit} className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"><Settings className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></button>
              <button onClick={onToggleVisibility} className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors">
                {widget.visible ? <Eye className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <EyeOff className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}
              </button>
              <select value={widget.size} onChange={(e) => onUpdate({ size: e.target.value as WidgetSize })}
                className="text-[10px] bg-slate-700/50 border border-slate-600/50 rounded px-1 py-0.5 text-slate-300">
                <option value="sm">صغير</option><option value="md">متوسط</option><option value="lg">كبير</option><option value="xl">كامل</option>
              </select>
              <button onClick={onRemove} className="p-1 rounded hover:bg-red-500/20 text-slate-400 hover:text-red-400 transition-colors"><Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></button>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="p-4 min-h-[120px]">
        {isLoading ? <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-24"><Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 text-cyan-400 animate-spin" /></div>
          : !data ? <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-slate-500 text-sm">لا توجد بيانات</div>
          : <WidgetContent type={widget.type} data={data} config={widget.config} />}
      </div>
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WIDGET CONTENT ROUTER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function WidgetContent({ type, data, config }: { type: string; data: any; config: Record<string, any> }) {
  switch (type) {
    case "stat-card": return <StatCardWidget data={data} />;
    case "multi-stat": return <MultiStatWidget data={data} />;
    case "kpi-card": return <KpiCardWidget data={data} />;
    case "comparison": return <ComparisonWidget data={data} />;
    case "bar-chart": case "horizontal-bar": return <BarChartWidget data={data} />;
    case "pie-chart": case "donut-chart": return <PieChartWidget data={data} donut={type === "donut-chart"} />;
    case "line-chart": case "area-chart": return <LineChartWidget data={data} filled={type === "area-chart"} />;
    case "radar-chart": return <RadarChartWidget data={data} />;
    case "data-table": case "mini-table": return <DataTableWidget data={data} mini={type === "mini-table"} />;
    case "live-feed": case "activity-feed": return <LiveFeedWidget data={data} />;
    case "timeline": return <TimelineWidget data={data} />;
    case "progress-bars": case "source-breakdown": return <ProgressBarsWidget data={data} />;
    case "progress-ring": case "gauge": return <ProgressRingWidget data={data} />;
    case "status-grid": case "heatmap": return <StatusGridWidget data={data} />;
    case "top-list": case "leaderboard": return <TopListWidget data={data} />;
    default: return <div className="text-slate-500 text-sm text-center">نوع غير معروف: {type}</div>;
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INDIVIDUAL WIDGET COMPONENTS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function StatCardWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const total = data.total || 0;
  const entries = Object.entries(data).filter(([k]) => k !== "total");
  return (
    <div>
      <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-1">{total.toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div>
      <div className="text-slate-400 text-xs mb-3">إجمالي السجلات</div>
      {entries.length > 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          {entries.slice(0, 4).map(([key, val]) => (
            <span key={key} className={`text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-full border ${SEVERITY_COLORS[key] || "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-300 border-slate-600/30"}`}>
              {key}: {String(val)}
            </span>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function MultiStatWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const stats = data.stats || [];
  const STAT_COLORS: Record<string, string> = { cyan: "text-cyan-400", red: "text-red-400", amber: "text-amber-400", emerald: "text-emerald-400", purple: "text-purple-400", blue: "text-blue-400", orange: "text-orange-400" };
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
      {stats.map((s: any, i: number) => (
        <div key={i} className="text-center p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50">
          <div className={`text-xl font-bold ${STAT_COLORS[s.color] || "text-white"}`}>{(s.value || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div>
          <div className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] mt-0.5">{s.label}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function KpiCardWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      <div className="flex items-baseline gap-3">
        <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{(data.total || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</span>
        <span className="text-slate-400 text-xs">إجمالي</span>
      </div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
        <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/20">
          <div className="text-emerald-400 text-lg font-bold">{(data.sum || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div>
          <div className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">المجموع</div>
        </div>
        <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/20">
          <div className="text-blue-400 text-lg font-bold">{(data.avg || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div>
          <div className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">المتوسط</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function ComparisonWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const change = data.change || 0;
  const isUp = change >= 0;
  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <span className={`text-2xl font-bold ${isUp ? "text-red-400" : "text-emerald-400"}`}>{isUp ? "↑" : "↓"} {Math.abs(change)}%</span>
        <span className="text-slate-400 text-xs">{data.period || "شهري"}</span>
      </div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
        <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50"><div className="text-white font-bold">{(data.current || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div><div className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">الشهر الحالي</div></div>
        <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50"><div className="text-white font-bold">{(data.previous || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div><div className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">الشهر السابق</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function BarChartWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const labels = data.labels || [];
  const values = data.values || [];
  const maxVal = Math.max(...values, 1);
  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      {labels.map((label: string, i: number) => (
        <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 w-20 truncate text-right">{label}</span>
          <div className="flex-1 h-5 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
            <motion.div initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${(values[i] / maxVal) * 100}%` }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: i * 0.1 }}
              className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: CHART_COLORS[i % CHART_COLORS.length] }} />
          </div>
          <span className="text-white text-xs font-medium w-8 text-left">{values[i]}</span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function PieChartWidget({ data, donut }: { data: any; donut?: boolean }) {
  const labels = data.labels || [];
  const values = data.values || [];
  const total = values.reduce((a: number, b: number) => a + b, 0) || 1;
  let cumulative = 0;
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
      <div className="relative w-28 h-28 flex-shrink-0">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
          {values.map((val: number, i: number) => {
            const pct = (val / total) * 100;
            const offset = cumulative;
            cumulative += pct;
            return <circle key={i} cx="50" cy="50" r={donut ? "35" : "45"} fill="transparent" stroke={CHART_COLORS[i % CHART_COLORS.length]}
              strokeWidth={donut ? "15" : "45"} strokeDasharray={`${pct * (donut ? 2.2 : 2.83)} ${1000}`} strokeDashoffset={`${-offset * (donut ? 2.2 : 2.83)}`} />;
          })}
        </svg>
        {donut && <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center"><span className="text-white text-sm font-bold">{total}</span></div>}
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 space-y-1.5 overflow-hidden">
        {labels.slice(0, 6).map((label: string, i: number) => (
          <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full flex-shrink-0" style={{ backgroundColor: CHART_COLORS[i % CHART_COLORS.length] }} />
            <span className="text-slate-300 text-[10px] truncate flex-1">{label}</span>
            <span className="text-white text-[10px] font-medium">{values[i]}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function LineChartWidget({ data, filled }: { data: any; filled?: boolean }) {
  const labels = data.labels || [];
  const values = data.values || [];
  if (values.length === 0) return <div className="text-slate-500 text-sm text-center">لا توجد بيانات زمنية</div>;
  const maxVal = Math.max(...values, 1);
  const points = values.map((v: number, i: number) => ({ x: (i / Math.max(values.length - 1, 1)) * 100, y: 100 - (v / maxVal) * 80 - 10 }));
  const pathD = points.map((p: any, i: number) => `${i === 0 ? "M" : "L"} ${p.x} ${p.y}`).join(" ");
  const areaD = pathD + ` L 100 100 L 0 100 Z`;
  return (
    <div>
      <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-24" preserveAspectRatio="none">
        {filled && <path d={areaD} fill="url(#areaGrad)" opacity="0.3" />}
        <path d={pathD} fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
        {points.map((p: any, i: number) => <circle key={i} cx={p.x} cy={p.y} r="1.5" fill="#06b6d4" />)}
        <defs><linearGradient id="areaGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stopColor="#06b6d4" stopOpacity="0.4" /><stop offset="100%" stopColor="#06b6d4" stopOpacity="0" /></linearGradient></defs>
      </svg>
      <div className="flex justify-between mt-1">
        {labels.length > 0 && <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500">{labels[0]}</span>}
        {labels.length > 1 && <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500">{labels[labels.length - 1]}</span>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function RadarChartWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const labels = data.labels || [];
  const values = data.values || [];
  const maxVal = Math.max(...values, 1);
  const n = labels.length;
  if (n < 3) return <div className="text-slate-500 text-sm text-center">يحتاج 3 قيم على الأقل</div>;
  const center = 50; const radius = 35;
  const getPoint = (i: number, val: number) => { const angle = (Math.PI * 2 * i) / n - Math.PI / 2; const r = (val / maxVal) * radius; return { x: center + r * Math.cos(angle), y: center + r * Math.sin(angle) }; };
  const polygonPoints = values.map((v: number, i: number) => { const p = getPoint(i, v); return `${p.x},${p.y}`; }).join(" ");
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-32 h-32">
        {[0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].map(scale => (
          <polygon key={scale} points={Array.from({ length: n }, (_, i) => { const p = getPoint(i, maxVal * scale); return `${p.x},${p.y}`; }).join(" ")}
            fill="none" stroke="rgba(148,163,184,0.15)" strokeWidth="0.5" />
        ))}
        <polygon points={polygonPoints} fill="rgba(6,182,212,0.2)" stroke="#06b6d4" strokeWidth="1" />
        {values.map((v: number, i: number) => { const p = getPoint(i, v); return <circle key={i} cx={p.x} cy={p.y} r="1.5" fill="#06b6d4" />; })}
      </svg>
    </div>
  );
}

function DataTableWidget({ data, mini }: { data: any; mini?: boolean }) {
  const rows = data.rows || [];
  const columns = data.columns || Object.keys(rows[0] || {});
  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto">
      <table className="w-full text-[11px]">
        <thead><tr className="border-b border-slate-700/50">
          {columns.slice(0, mini ? 3 : 6).map((col: string) => <th key={col} className="text-right text-slate-400 font-medium py-1.5 px-2">{col}</th>)}
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          {rows.slice(0, mini ? 5 : 10).map((row: any, i: number) => (
            <tr key={i} className="border-b border-slate-800/50 hover:bg-slate-800/30">
              {columns.slice(0, mini ? 3 : 6).map((col: string) => <td key={col} className="text-right text-slate-300 py-1.5 px-2 truncate max-w-[120px]">{String(row[col] ?? "-")}</td>)}
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}

function LiveFeedWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const items = data.items || [];
  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      {items.slice(0, 6).map((item: any, i: number) => (
        <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/30">
          <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 ${item.severity === "critical" ? "bg-red-500" : item.severity === "high" ? "bg-orange-500" : item.severity === "medium" ? "bg-amber-500" : "bg-emerald-500"}`} />
          <span className="text-slate-300 text-[11px] truncate flex-1">{item.titleAr || item.refId || `#${item.id}`}</span>
          {item.severity && <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border ${SEVERITY_COLORS[item.severity] || ""}`}>{item.severity}</span>}
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function TimelineWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const events = data.events || [];
  return (
    <div className="relative pr-4">
      <div className="absolute right-1 top-0 bottom-0 w-0.5 bg-slate-700/50" />
      {events.slice(0, 8).map((event: any, i: number) => (
        <div key={i} className="relative mb-3 pr-4">
          <div className={`absolute right-0 top-1.5 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full border-2 ${event.severity === "critical" ? "bg-red-500 border-red-400" : event.severity === "high" ? "bg-orange-500 border-orange-400" : "bg-cyan-500 border-cyan-400"}`} />
          <div className="text-slate-300 text-[11px]">{event.title || `حدث #${event.id}`}</div>
          {event.date && <div className="text-slate-500 text-[9px]">{new Date(event.date).toLocaleDateString("ar-SA")}</div>}
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function ProgressBarsWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const labels = data.labels || [];
  const values = data.values || [];
  const total = data.total || values.reduce((a: number, b: number) => a + b, 0) || 1;
  return (
    <div className="space-y-2.5">
      {labels.map((label: string, i: number) => {
        const pct = Math.round((values[i] / total) * 100);
        return (
          <div key={i}>
            <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] mb-1"><span className="text-slate-300">{label}</span><span className="text-slate-400">{values[i]} ({pct}%)</span></div>
            <div className="h-2 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
              <motion.div initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${pct}%` }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: i * 0.1 }}
                className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: CHART_COLORS[i % CHART_COLORS.length] }} />
            </div>
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

function ProgressRingWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const pct = data.percentage || 0;
  const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * 40;
  const offset = circumference - (pct / 100) * circumference;
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
      <div className="relative w-24 h-24">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full -rotate-90">
          <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="rgba(148,163,184,0.1)" strokeWidth="8" />
          <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" strokeWidth="8" strokeDasharray={circumference} strokeDashoffset={offset} strokeLinecap="round" className="transition-all duration-1000" />
        </svg>
        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center"><span className="text-white text-lg font-bold">{pct}%</span></div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div className="text-white font-bold">{(data.value || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div>
        <div className="text-slate-400 text-xs">من {(data.total || 0).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</div>
        <div className="text-cyan-400 text-[10px] mt-1">{data.label || ""}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function StatusGridWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const items = data.items || [];
  const maxVal = Math.max(...items.map((i: any) => i.value), 1);
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
      {items.map((item: any, i: number) => (
        <div key={i} className="p-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-700/30 text-center" style={{ backgroundColor: `rgba(6,182,212,${Math.round((item.value / maxVal) * 100) / 300})` }}>
          <div className="text-white text-sm font-bold">{item.value}</div>
          <div className="text-slate-400 text-[9px] truncate">{item.label}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function TopListWidget({ data }: { data: any }) {
  const items = data.items || [];
  const maxVal = Math.max(...items.map((i: any) => i.value), 1);
  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      {items.map((item: any, i: number) => (
        <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className={`w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold ${i === 0 ? "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400" : i === 1 ? "bg-slate-400/20 text-slate-300" : i === 2 ? "bg-orange-700/20 text-orange-400" : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400"}`}>{item.rank || i + 1}</span>
          <span className="text-slate-300 text-[11px] flex-1 truncate">{item.label}</span>
          <div className="w-16 h-1.5 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div className="h-full rounded-full bg-cyan-500" style={{ width: `${(item.value / maxVal) * 100}%` }} /></div>
          <span className="text-white text-[11px] font-medium w-8 text-left">{item.value}</span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WIDGET CATALOG MODAL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function WidgetCatalogModal({ onClose, onSelect, category, onCategoryChange }: { onClose: () => void; onSelect: (type: string) => void; category: string; onCategoryChange: (c: string) => void }) {
  const filtered = category === "all" ? WIDGET_CATALOG : WIDGET_CATALOG.filter(w => w.category === category);
  return (
    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center" onClick={onClose}>
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
      <motion.div initial={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }} exit={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }}
        className="relative w-full max-w-2xl mx-4 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col"
        style={{ background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 50%, #0f172a 100%)", border: "1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.15)" }}
        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-5 border-b border-slate-700/50">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center"><Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-white" /></div>
            <div><h2 className="text-white font-bold text-lg">كتالوج العناصر</h2><p className="text-slate-400 text-xs">{WIDGET_CATALOG.length} نوع عنصر متاح</p></div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center"><X className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-400" /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-3 border-b border-slate-700/30 overflow-x-auto">
          {WIDGET_CATEGORIES.map(cat => (
            <button key={cat.id} onClick={() => onCategoryChange(cat.id)}
              className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all ${category === cat.id ? "bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/30" : "bg-slate-800/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600"}`}>
              <cat.icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />{cat.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="p-5 overflow-y-auto flex-1">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            {filtered.map((widget, i) => (
              <motion.button key={widget.type} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ delay: i * 0.03 }}
                onClick={() => onSelect(widget.type)}
                className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-700/30 bg-slate-800/30 hover:border-cyan-500/30 hover:bg-cyan-500/5 transition-all group">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-500/20 to-blue-600/20 border border-cyan-500/20 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                  <widget.icon className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400" />
                </div>
                <span className="text-white text-xs font-medium">{widget.label}</span>
                <span className="text-slate-500 text-[9px] text-center">{widget.description}</span>
              </motion.button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WIDGET SETTINGS MODAL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function WidgetSettingsModal({ widget, dataSources, onClose, onUpdate }: {
  widget: WidgetConfig; dataSources: any[]; onClose: () => void; onUpdate: (u: Partial<WidgetConfig>) => void;
}) {
  const [localDs, setLocalDs] = useState(widget.dataSource);
  const [localConfig, setLocalConfig] = useState(widget.config || {});
  const [localSize, setLocalSize] = useState(widget.size);
  const dsInfo = dataSources.find((ds: any) => ds.id === localDs);
  const groupByFields = dsInfo?.groupByFields || [];
  const dateFields = dsInfo?.dateFields || [];
  const numericFields = dsInfo?.numericFields || [];

  return (
    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center" onClick={onClose}>
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
      <motion.div initial={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }} exit={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }}
        className="relative w-full max-w-md mx-4 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden"
        style={{ background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 50%, #0f172a 100%)", border: "1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.15)" }}
        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-5 border-b border-slate-700/50">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3"><Settings className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400" /><h2 className="text-white font-bold">إعدادات العنصر</h2></div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center"><X className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-400" /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-5 space-y-4" dir="rtl">
          <div>
            <label className="block text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">مصدر البيانات</label>
            <select value={localDs} onChange={(e) => { setLocalDs(e.target.value); setLocalConfig({}); }}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-600/50 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-cyan-500/50">
              {dataSources.map((ds: any) => <option key={ds.id} value={ds.id}>{ds.label} ({ds.labelEn})</option>)}
            </select>
          </div>
          {groupByFields.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <label className="block text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">التجميع حسب</label>
              <select value={localConfig.groupBy || ""} onChange={(e) => setLocalConfig({ ...localConfig, groupBy: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-600/50 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-cyan-500/50">
                <option value="">تلقائي</option>
                {groupByFields.map((f: string) => <option key={f} value={f}>{f}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>
          )}
          {dateFields.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <label className="block text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">حقل التاريخ</label>
              <select value={localConfig.dateField || ""} onChange={(e) => setLocalConfig({ ...localConfig, dateField: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-600/50 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-cyan-500/50">
                <option value="">تلقائي</option>
                {dateFields.map((f: string) => <option key={f} value={f}>{f}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>
          )}
          {numericFields.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <label className="block text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">الحقل الرقمي</label>
              <select value={localConfig.numericField || ""} onChange={(e) => setLocalConfig({ ...localConfig, numericField: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-600/50 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-cyan-500/50">
                <option value="">تلقائي</option>
                {numericFields.map((f: string) => <option key={f} value={f}>{f}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>
          )}
          <div>
            <label className="block text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">عدد النتائج</label>
            <input type="number" value={localConfig.limit || 10} onChange={(e) => setLocalConfig({ ...localConfig, limit: Number(e.target.value) })}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-600/50 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-cyan-500/50" min={1} max={100} />
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="block text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">حجم العنصر</label>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-2">
              {(["sm", "md", "lg", "xl"] as WidgetSize[]).map(size => (
                <button key={size} onClick={() => setLocalSize(size)}
                  className={`py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all ${localSize === size ? "bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/30" : "bg-slate-800/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700/30"}`}>
                  {size === "sm" ? "صغير" : size === "md" ? "متوسط" : size === "lg" ? "كبير" : "كامل"}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-2">
            <button onClick={onClose} className="flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium">إلغاء</button>
            <button onClick={() => onUpdate({ dataSource: localDs, config: localConfig, size: localSize })}
              className="flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 text-white text-sm font-bold hover:shadow-lg">حفظ الإعدادات</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SHARE MODAL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function ShareModal({ pageId, onClose }: { pageId: number; onClose: () => void }) {
  const createShareMutation = trpc.customPages.createShareLink.useMutation();
  const revokeShareMutation = trpc.customPages.revokeShareLink.useMutation();
  const shareLinksQuery = trpc.customPages.getShareLinks.useQuery({ pageId });
  const [expiresInDays, setExpiresInDays] = useState<number | undefined>(undefined);
  const [shareUrl, setShareUrl] = useState("");
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);

  const handleCreateLink = async () => {
    try {
      const result = await createShareMutation.mutateAsync({ pageId, expiresInDays });
      if (result.token) setShareUrl(`${window.location.origin}/shared/${result.token}`);
      shareLinksQuery.refetch();
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  };

  const handleCopy = () => { navigator.clipboard.writeText(shareUrl); setCopied(true); setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); };
  const links = shareLinksQuery.data || [];

  return (
    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center" onClick={onClose}>
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
      <motion.div initial={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }} exit={{ scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }}
        className="relative w-full max-w-md mx-4 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden"
        style={{ background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 50%, #0f172a 100%)", border: "1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.15)" }}
        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-5 border-b border-slate-700/50">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3"><Share2 className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-400" /><h2 className="text-white font-bold">مشاركة الصفحة</h2></div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center"><X className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-400" /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-5 space-y-4" dir="rtl">
          <div>
            <label className="block text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">مدة صلاحية الرابط</label>
            <select value={expiresInDays || ""} onChange={(e) => setExpiresInDays(e.target.value ? Number(e.target.value) : undefined)}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-600/50 text-white text-sm">
              <option value="">بدون انتهاء</option><option value="1">يوم واحد</option><option value="7">أسبوع</option><option value="30">شهر</option><option value="90">3 أشهر</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <button onClick={handleCreateLink} disabled={createShareMutation.isPending}
            className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-pink-600 text-white text-sm font-bold hover:shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50">
            {createShareMutation.isPending ? "جاري الإنشاء..." : "إنشاء رابط مشاركة"}
          </button>
          {shareUrl && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/80 border border-purple-500/30">
              <input readOnly value={shareUrl} className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-slate-300 text-xs outline-none" dir="ltr" />
              <button onClick={handleCopy} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700/50">
                {copied ? <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-400" /> : <Copy className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-400" />}
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
          {links.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium mb-2">الروابط النشطة ({links.filter((l: any) => l.isActive).length})</h3>
              {links.filter((l: any) => l.isActive).map((link: any) => (
                <div key={link.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 text-[11px] mb-1">
                  <span className="text-slate-400">مشاهدات: {link.viewCount}</span>
                  {link.expiresAt && <span className="text-slate-500">ينتهي: {new Date(link.expiresAt).toLocaleDateString("ar-SA")}</span>}
                </div>
              ))}
              <button onClick={async () => { await revokeShareMutation.mutateAsync({ pageId }); setShareUrl(""); shareLinksQuery.refetch(); }}
                className="mt-2 w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 text-red-400 text-xs hover:bg-red-500/20">إلغاء جميع الروابط</button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </motion.div>
    </motion.div>
  );
}

```

---

## `client/src/pages/DynamicReport.tsx`

```tsx
/**
 * DynamicReport — Enhanced Custom Report Builder with Real Data
 * All data sections (stats, charts, tables) fetch from real database
 * Supports flexible data source switching, export PDF, print
 */
import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { useParams } from "wouter";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
import {
  Plus, X, GripVertical, FileText, Download, Eye, Settings,
  Type, BarChart3, Table2, Image, ChevronUp, ChevronDown, ChevronRight,
  Sparkles, Save, Printer, FileDown, AlignRight, AlignCenter,
  Heading1, Heading2, List, ListOrdered, Quote, Minus,
  Database, Shield, Globe, Users, FileCheck, AlertTriangle, Mail, Radio,
  PieChart, TrendingUp, Activity, Loader2, Share2, Check, Hash,
  Calendar, Target, Gauge, LayoutGrid,
} from "lucide-react";
import { trpc } from "../lib/trpc";

const DATA_SOURCE_ICONS: Record<string, any> = {
  leaks: Shield, sellers: Users, evidence: FileCheck,
  sites: Globe, channels: Radio, incidents: AlertTriangle, letters: Mail,
};

// Section types — expanded with data-driven sections
const SECTION_TYPES = [
  { id: "heading", icon: Heading1, title: "عنوان رئيسي", description: "عنوان كبير لقسم جديد", color: "from-blue-500 to-indigo-600", category: "نصي" },
  { id: "subheading", icon: Heading2, title: "عنوان فرعي", description: "عنوان أصغر لقسم فرعي", color: "from-blue-400 to-blue-600", category: "نصي" },
  { id: "paragraph", icon: Type, title: "فقرة نصية", description: "نص حر قابل للتعديل", color: "from-slate-500 to-slate-600", category: "نصي" },
  { id: "quote", icon: Quote, title: "اقتباس", description: "نص مقتبس أو ملاحظة مهمة", color: "from-violet-500 to-purple-600", category: "نصي" },
  { id: "bullet-list", icon: List, title: "قائمة نقطية", description: "قائمة بنقاط", color: "from-teal-500 to-cyan-600", category: "نصي" },
  { id: "numbered-list", icon: ListOrdered, title: "قائمة مرقمة", description: "قائمة بأرقام", color: "from-sky-500 to-blue-600", category: "نصي" },
  { id: "divider", icon: Minus, title: "فاصل", description: "خط فاصل بين الأقسام", color: "from-gray-500 to-gray-600", category: "نصي" },
  // Data-driven sections
  { id: "stat-summary", icon: Hash, title: "ملخص إحصائي", description: "كروت أرقام من قاعدة البيانات", color: "from-cyan-500 to-blue-600", category: "بيانات" },
  { id: "data-table", icon: Table2, title: "جدول بيانات", description: "جدول فعلي من قاعدة البيانات", color: "from-amber-500 to-orange-600", category: "بيانات" },
  { id: "bar-chart", icon: BarChart3, title: "مخطط أعمدة", description: "مخطط أعمدة من بيانات فعلية", color: "from-emerald-500 to-green-600", category: "بيانات" },
  { id: "pie-chart", icon: PieChart, title: "مخطط دائري", description: "مخطط دائري من بيانات فعلية", color: "from-purple-500 to-pink-600", category: "بيانات" },
  { id: "trend-line", icon: TrendingUp, title: "خط اتجاه", description: "مخطط اتجاه زمني", color: "from-rose-500 to-red-600", category: "بيانات" },
  { id: "kpi-cards", icon: Target, title: "مؤشرات أداء", description: "بطاقات KPI من البيانات الفعلية", color: "from-indigo-500 to-blue-600", category: "بيانات" },
  { id: "top-list", icon: Activity, title: "قائمة الأعلى", description: "أعلى العناصر حسب معيار", color: "from-orange-500 to-amber-600", category: "بيانات" },
];

interface ReportSection {
  instanceId: string;
  typeId: string;
  content: string;
  config: Record<string, any>;
}

// ═══ Data-driven Section Component ═══
function DataSection({ section, dataSources, isEditMode, onConfigChange }: {
  section: ReportSection;
  dataSources: any[];
  isEditMode: boolean;
  onConfigChange: (config: Record<string, any>) => void;
}) {
  const ds = section.config.dataSource || "leaks";
  const currentDs = dataSources.find((d: any) => d.id === ds);
  const groupByField = section.config.groupBy || currentDs?.groupByFields?.[0] || "severity";
  const numericField = section.config.numericField || currentDs?.numericFields?.[0];
  const limitVal = section.config.limit || 5;

  // Fetch aggregation data
  const aggQuery = trpc.customPages.aggregation.useQuery(
    { dataSource: ds, aggregationType: section.config.aggType || "count", field: numericField, groupBy: groupByField, limit: limitVal },
    { enabled: ["bar-chart", "pie-chart", "top-list", "kpi-cards"].includes(section.typeId), staleTime: 30000 }
  );

  // Fetch stat data
  const statQuery = trpc.customPages.widgetData.useQuery(
    { widgetType: "stat-card", dataSource: ds, config: {} },
    { enabled: section.typeId === "stat-summary", staleTime: 30000 }
  );

  // Fetch table data
  const tableQuery = trpc.customPages.tableData.useQuery(
    { dataSource: ds, columns: section.config.columns || currentDs?.columns?.slice(0, 5).map((c: any) => c.id) || [], page: 1, limit: section.config.tableLimit || 10 },
    { enabled: section.typeId === "data-table", staleTime: 30000 }
  );

  // Fetch trend data
  const trendQuery = trpc.customPages.widgetData.useQuery(
    { widgetType: "trend-chart", dataSource: ds, config: { dateField: section.config.dateField || currentDs?.dateFields?.[0], groupBy: groupByField } },
    { enabled: section.typeId === "trend-line", staleTime: 30000 }
  );

  // Config editor for edit mode
  const renderConfigEditor = () => {
    if (!isEditMode) return null;
    return (
      <div className="mt-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-700/30 space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
          <label className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">مصدر البيانات:</label>
          <select value={ds} onChange={(e) => onConfigChange({ ...section.config, dataSource: e.target.value })}
            className="bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-white text-[11px]">
            {dataSources.map((d: any) => <option key={d.id} value={d.id}>{d.label}</option>)}
          </select>
          {currentDs?.groupByFields && (
            <>
              <label className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">تجميع حسب:</label>
              <select value={groupByField} onChange={(e) => onConfigChange({ ...section.config, groupBy: e.target.value })}
                className="bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-white text-[11px]">
                {currentDs.groupByFields.map((f: string) => {
                  const col = currentDs.columns.find((c: any) => c.id === f);
                  return <option key={f} value={f}>{col?.label || f}</option>;
                })}
              </select>
            </>
          )}
          <label className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">الحد:</label>
          <select value={limitVal} onChange={(e) => onConfigChange({ ...section.config, limit: Number(e.target.value) })}
            className="bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-white text-[11px]">
            {[3, 5, 7, 10, 15, 20].map(n => <option key={n} value={n}>{n}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  // ═══ Render by section type ═══
  switch (section.typeId) {
    case "stat-summary": {
      const data = statQuery.data?.data;
      if (statQuery.isLoading) return <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-6"><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400 animate-spin" /></div>;
      const stats = [
        { label: "الإجمالي", value: data?.total || 0, color: "text-cyan-400" },
        { label: "واسع النطاق", value: data?.critical || 0, color: "text-red-400" },
        { label: "مرتفع", value: data?.high || 0, color: "text-orange-400" },
        { label: "متوسط", value: data?.medium || 0, color: "text-amber-400" },
      ];
      return (
        <div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
            {stats.map((s, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/30 text-center">
                <p className={`text-2xl font-bold ${s.color}`}>{Number(s.value).toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</p>
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-1">{s.label}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {renderConfigEditor()}
        </div>
      );
    }

    case "data-table": {
      const rows = tableQuery.data?.rows || [];
      const cols = section.config.columns || currentDs?.columns?.slice(0, 5).map((c: any) => c.id) || [];
      if (tableQuery.isLoading) return <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-6"><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400 animate-spin" /></div>;
      return (
        <div>
          <div className="rounded-xl bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/30 overflow-hidden">
            <table className="w-full text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-slate-700/30">
                  {cols.map((colId: string) => {
                    const col = currentDs?.columns?.find((c: any) => c.id === colId);
                    return <th key={colId} className="px-3 py-2 text-right text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400">{col?.label || colId}</th>;
                  })}
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {rows.length === 0 ? (
                  <tr><td colSpan={cols.length} className="px-4 py-6 text-center text-slate-500 text-sm">لا توجد بيانات</td></tr>
                ) : rows.map((row: any, i: number) => (
                  <tr key={i} className="border-b border-slate-800/30 hover:bg-slate-800/20">
                    {cols.map((colId: string) => (
                      <td key={colId} className="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-slate-300 truncate max-w-[180px]">{String(row[colId] ?? "-")}</td>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          {isEditMode && (
            <div className="mt-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-700/30 space-y-2">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                <label className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">مصدر البيانات:</label>
                <select value={ds} onChange={(e) => onConfigChange({ ...section.config, dataSource: e.target.value })}
                  className="bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-white text-[11px]">
                  {dataSources.map((d: any) => <option key={d.id} value={d.id}>{d.label}</option>)}
                </select>
                <label className="text-slate-400 text-[10px]">عدد الصفوف:</label>
                <select value={section.config.tableLimit || 10} onChange={(e) => onConfigChange({ ...section.config, tableLimit: Number(e.target.value) })}
                  className="bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-white text-[11px]">
                  {[5, 10, 15, 20, 25].map(n => <option key={n} value={n}>{n}</option>)}
                </select>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-1">
                {currentDs?.columns?.map((col: any) => (
                  <button key={col.id} onClick={() => {
                    const current = section.config.columns || currentDs?.columns?.slice(0, 5).map((c: any) => c.id) || [];
                    const newCols = current.includes(col.id) ? current.filter((c: string) => c !== col.id) : [...current, col.id];
                    onConfigChange({ ...section.config, columns: newCols });
                  }}
                    className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] border transition-all ${
                      (section.config.columns || currentDs?.columns?.slice(0, 5).map((c: any) => c.id) || []).includes(col.id)
                        ? "bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400 border-cyan-500/30" : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-500 border-slate-600/30"
                    }`}>
                    {col.label}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      );
    }

    case "bar-chart":
    case "pie-chart":
    case "top-list": {
      const result = aggQuery.data?.result;
      if (aggQuery.isLoading) return <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-6"><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400 animate-spin" /></div>;
      if (!Array.isArray(result) || result.length === 0) return <div className="text-center py-6 text-slate-500 text-sm">لا توجد بيانات للعرض</div>;

      const maxVal = Math.max(...result.map((r: any) => r.value));
      const COLORS = ["#06b6d4", "#8b5cf6", "#f59e0b", "#ef4444", "#10b981", "#ec4899", "#3b82f6", "#f97316", "#14b8a6", "#a855f7"];

      if (section.typeId === "pie-chart") {
        const total = result.reduce((s: number, r: any) => s + r.value, 0);
        return (
          <div>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-6 py-4">
              {/* Simple CSS pie representation */}
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 flex-1">
                {result.map((item: any, i: number) => {
                  const pct = total > 0 ? ((item.value / total) * 100).toFixed(1) : "0";
                  return (
                    <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <div className="w-3 h-3 rounded-full flex-shrink-0" style={{ backgroundColor: COLORS[i % COLORS.length] }} />
                      <span className="text-slate-300 text-xs flex-1">{item.group}</span>
                      <span className="text-white text-xs font-medium">{item.value.toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</span>
                      <span className="text-slate-500 text-[10px]">({pct}%)</span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
            {renderConfigEditor()}
          </div>
        );
      }

      if (section.typeId === "top-list") {
        return (
          <div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {result.map((item: any, i: number) => (
                <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/30">
                  <span className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[10px] font-bold flex-shrink-0">{i + 1}</span>
                  <span className="text-slate-300 text-xs flex-1">{item.group}</span>
                  <span className="text-white text-xs font-bold">{item.value.toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</span>
                  <div className="w-20 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-slate-700 overflow-hidden">
                    <div className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ width: `${maxVal > 0 ? (item.value / maxVal) * 100 : 0}%`, backgroundColor: COLORS[i % COLORS.length] }} />
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            {renderConfigEditor()}
          </div>
        );
      }

      // Bar chart
      return (
        <div>
          <div className="space-y-2 py-2">
            {result.map((item: any, i: number) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span className="text-slate-400 text-[11px] w-24 text-left truncate">{item.group}</span>
                <div className="flex-1 h-6 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 overflow-hidden relative">
                  <motion.div initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${maxVal > 0 ? (item.value / maxVal) * 100 : 0}%` }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, delay: i * 0.1 }}
                    className="h-full rounded-lg" style={{ backgroundColor: COLORS[i % COLORS.length] }} />
                  <span className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[10px] font-bold">{item.value.toLocaleString("ar-SA")}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {renderConfigEditor()}
        </div>
      );
    }

    case "trend-line": {
      const trendData = trendQuery.data?.data;
      if (trendQuery.isLoading) return <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-6"><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-400 animate-spin" /></div>;
      const points = trendData?.points || [];
      if (points.length === 0) return <div className="text-center py-6 text-slate-500 text-sm">لا توجد بيانات اتجاه</div>;
      const maxP = Math.max(...points.map((p: any) => p.count || 0));
      return (
        <div>
          <div className="flex items-end gap-1 h-32 py-2">
            {points.map((p: any, i: number) => (
```
